PFASgroups
  • License
  • View page source

License

PFASgroups License

This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial 4.0 International License.

You are free to:

Share — copy and redistribute the material in any medium or format

Adapt — remix, transform, and build upon the material

The licensor cannot revoke these freedoms as long as you follow the license terms.

Under the following terms:

Attribution — You must give appropriate credit, provide a link to the license, and indicate if changes were made. You may do so in any reasonable manner, but not in any way that suggests the licensor endorses you or your use.

NonCommercial — You may not use the material for commercial purposes.

No additional restrictions — You may not apply legal terms or technological measures that legally restrict others from doing anything the license permits.

Notices:

You do not have to comply with the license for elements of the material in the public domain or where your use is permitted by an applicable exception or limitation.

No warranties are given. The license may not give you all of the permissions necessary for your intended use. For example, other rights such as publicity, privacy, or moral rights may limit how you use the material.

Commercial Use

If you wish to use PFASgroups for commercial purposes, please contact the author for licensing options.

Contact for commercial licensing:

  • Name: Luc T. Miaz

  • Email: luc.miaz@aces.su.se

  • Institution: Stockholm University, Department of Environmental Science

Attribution Requirements

When using PFASgroups in academic or non-commercial work, please cite:

Citation:

Miaz, L.T., Cousins, I.T. (2026). Automatic Determination and Classification
of Per- and Polyfluoroalkyl Substances. Journal of Cheminformatics (in preparation).

BibTeX:

@article{miaz2026pfasgroups,
  title={Automatic Determination and Classification of Per- and Polyfluoroalkyl Substances},
  author={Miaz, Luc T. and Cousins, Ian T.},
  journal={Journal of Cheminformatics},
  year={2026},
  note={in preparation}
}

Acknowledgments

This project is part of the ZeroPM project (WP2) and has received funding from the European Union’s Horizon 2020 research and innovation programme under grant agreement No 101036756.

Developed at:

Stockholm University Department of Environmental Science (ACES) https://aces.su.se

Third-Party Licenses

PFASgroups depends on several open-source libraries:

RDKit

License: BSD 3-Clause License

Copyright (c) 2006-2023, Greg Landrum and Rational Discovery LLC

RDKit is used for molecular operations and SMARTS pattern matching.

NumPy

License: BSD 3-Clause License

Copyright (c) 2005-2023, NumPy Developers

NetworkX

License: BSD 3-Clause License

Copyright (c) 2004-2023, NetworkX Developers

Pandas

License: BSD 3-Clause License

Copyright (c) 2008-2023, AQR Capital Management, LLC, Lambda Foundry, Inc. and PyData Development Team

Matplotlib

License: Python Software Foundation License

Copyright (c) 2002-2023, John D. Hunter, Michael Droettboom and the Matplotlib development team

Full License Text

The full text of the Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial 4.0 International License can be found at:

https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/legalcode

Disclaimer

THIS SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED BY THE COPYRIGHT HOLDERS AND CONTRIBUTORS “AS IS” AND ANY EXPRESS OR IMPLIED WARRANTIES, INCLUDING, BUT NOT LIMITED TO, THE IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY AND FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE ARE DISCLAIMED. IN NO EVENT SHALL THE COPYRIGHT HOLDER OR CONTRIBUTORS BE LIABLE FOR ANY DIRECT, INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, EXEMPLARY, OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES (INCLUDING, BUT NOT LIMITED TO, PROCUREMENT OF SUBSTITUTE GOODS OR SERVICES; LOSS OF USE, DATA, OR PROFITS; OR BUSINESS INTERRUPTION) HOWEVER CAUSED AND ON ANY THEORY OF LIABILITY, WHETHER IN CONTRACT, STRICT LIABILITY, OR TORT (INCLUDING NEGLIGENCE OR OTHERWISE) ARISING IN ANY WAY OUT OF THE USE OF THIS SOFTWARE, EVEN IF ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGE.

Privacy

PFASgroups does not collect, store, or transmit any personal data or usage statistics. All processing is performed locally on your computer.

Questions

For questions about licensing, please contact:

Luc T. Miaz luc.miaz@aces.su.se Stockholm University, Department of Environmental Science
